name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
Welcome to TableReserve! Here's how it works:

📅 Tap /start to open the menu, then:
• Book a table — pick date, time, and party size
• View your upcoming bookings
• Reschedule or cancel anytime

🔔 We'll send you a reminder before your reservation.

If you're restaurant staff, use /admin to manage bookings.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
